score_summary.note: Official IQ score assignment still requires reviewer decisions, manual-check evidence, accepted-exception documentation, and any required correlation or exception designators.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_Serdes_Rx
manual_review_queue.title: Default [Model Selector] entries are consistent
details: Default model selector consistency depends on product configuration and likely use cases.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Temperature Range] is reasonable
details: Requires extraction conditions, technology behavior, and datasheet operating temperature comparison.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Model] Vinl and Vinh reasonable
details: Requires comparing thresholds against datasheet and Vmeas intent.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Model Spec] Vinl and Vinh reasonable
details: Requires datasheet threshold ranges and supply variation interpretation.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Model Spec] Vinl+/- and Vinh+/- complete and reasonable
details: Requires datasheet/hysteresis intent plus comment review for exceptions.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Model Spec] S_Overshoot subparameters complete and match data sheet

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Model Spec] D_Overshoot_* subparameters complete and match data sheet
details: Requires datasheet dynamic overshoot limits and documented conversion method.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Receiver Thresholds] Vth present and matches data sheet, if needed
details: Requires datasheet timing threshold and receiver-threshold applicability.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Receiver Thresholds] Vth_min and Vth_max present and match data sheet, if needed

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Receiver Thresholds] Vinh_ac, Vinl_ac present and match data sheet, if needed
details: Requires datasheet AC threshold values and offset conversion review.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Receiver Thresholds] Vinh_dc, Vinl_dc present and match data sheet, if needed
details: Requires datasheet DC threshold values and offset conversion review.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Receiver Thresholds] Tslew_ac/Tdiffslew_ac present and match data sheet, if needed
details: Requires datasheet slew-limit values and differential/single-ended applicability.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Receiver Thresholds] Threshold_sensitivity and Ext_ref present and match data sheet, if needed

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: I-V behavior not double-counted
details: Double-counting of clamp, driver, and termination behavior needs curve/context review.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: On-die termination modeling documented
details: Requires documentation review for on-die termination modeling method.

manual_review_queue.subject: lfd2nx_in
manual_review_queue.title: [Model Spec] Vmeas and Vref used if typ/min/max variation
details: Requires deciding whether Vmeas/Vref variation exists across corners.

signoff_summary.note: Final IQ assignment is ready only when hard blockers are zero and all semi-auto and manual review items have documented decisions.
